publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

ead.archdesc:
======= RMM03199San Francisco Planning and Urban Renewal records3199Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections

This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor) >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
San Francisco Planning and Urban Renewal records
San Francisco Planning and Urban Renewal Association
3199
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
[ca.1911-1969] Organizational records, reports, photographs, and printed materials. Includes records related to housing planning and redevelopment; recreation; land use; organizational materials; social policy; and transportation. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 5 ======= 5 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 2068265
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
December 2014
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, December 2014
Date modified:
Marcie Farwell, February 2016
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
The San Francisco Housing Association became the San Francisco Planning and Housing Association, and then the San Francisco Planning and Urban Renewal Association (SPUR). It is now the San Francisco Planning and Urban Research Association.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes records related to housing planning and redevelopment; recreation; land use; organizational materials; social policy; and transportation. Includes paper of Don Emmons as president; reports on housing by Catherine Bauer Wurster; and records of the Pacific Southwest Council of the National Association of Housing and Redevelopment Officials.
Cite As:
San Francisco Planning and Urban Renewal records, #3199. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
San Francisco (Calif.) City planning -- California -- San Francisco. Transportation. Land use. Urban renewal. Housing. Emmons, Don. Wurster, Catherine Bauer. National Association of Housing and Redevelopment Officials. Pacific Southwest Council San Francisco Housing Association San Francisco Planning and Housing Association
